name: Acme Backend Team Kit
description: Standard skill set for the Acme Corp backend engineering team
author: acme-platform-team
claudeMdTemplate:
## Workflow Orchestration

- Enter plan mode for ANY non-trivial task (3+ steps)
- Use subagents for parallel research
- Stop and re-plan if something goes wrong

## Core Principles

- Simplicity First: minimal, targeted changes
- No Laziness: find root causes
- Minimal Impact: only touch what is necessary

## Testing

- Run tests before every commit
- Never mark a task complete without proof it works

## Git Workflow

- Feature branches for all changes
- Descriptive commit messages
- PRs require at least one review
